title: Alpha Memo Forensics Engine
thesis: A local research-quality prototype for checking synthetic investment memo claims against evidence, freshness, contradiction, and traceability signals.
dataset: Synthetic local fixtures generated deterministically from a seed.
Typed records stored in a local DuckDB database.
Evidence identifiers preserved from ingestion through report generation.
No external services, credentials, or production data are required.
build: Synthetic memo, catalyst, source, and market-signal records.
Claim forensics for unsupported assertions, stale evidence, and contradiction risk.
Verifiable reports, CSV findings, and an offline analytics dashboard.
Offline dashboard generated as a static HTML artifact.
Evidence verifier rejects unsupported or unknown claims.
tests: Unit tests cover the end-to-end local workflow.
Verifier tests cover unsupported and unknown evidence references.
Dashboard escaping tests cover fixture text rendered into HTML.
Benchmark: record count, runtime, artifact count, and verification status are recorded.
